# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: ci-docker-builder
  labels:
    app: ci-build-agent
spec:
  containers:
  - name: docker-build-container
    image: docker:24.0.5-cli # Use a specific version of the Docker CLI client
    command: ["sleep", "infinity"] # Keep the container running for manual interaction or for an entrypoint script to execute
    securityContext:
      privileged: true # Grants all capabilities to the container, necessary for full Docker daemon interaction and device access
    volumeMounts:
    - name: docker-socket-volume
      mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
    - name: docker-data-volume
      mountPath: /var/lib/docker # Mounts the host's Docker data directory for consistent image storage and cache
  volumes:
  - name: docker-socket-volume
    hostPath:
      path: /var/run/docker.sock
      type: Socket
  - name: docker-data-volume
    hostPath:
      path: /var/lib/docker
      type: DirectoryOrCreate
